rows.label: qev056502_MSG0001
rows.name:
Oh, it's you...
Do you have some business with me?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056502_MSG0002
rows.name:
...The Guard Machines are malfunctioning?
That is a problem.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056502_MSG0003
rows.name:
If something were to happen to the Biahno Water Purification Plant,
we would no longer be able to make Senirapa Water.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056502_MSG0004
rows.name:
This is a critical issue for us as well—
Let's head to the Biahno Water Purification Plant immediately.[ST:wait ]
